response.original_title: Magyar népmesék: A király, aki nem akarja férjhez adni a lányát
response.overview: There is a wealthy king living in a castle, who loves his only daughter very much. So much so, that he never lets her to go outside. To his woe, one day the princess falls in love.
response.title: Magyar népmesék: A király, aki nem akarja férjhez adni a lányát
